Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while Ragewing throws axes at 3 random enemy units. The axes drain their life force for 3 sec and deal pure damage equal to 20% of Ragewing's max health. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. When their life force is being drained, the units deal 25% less damage and take 40% more damage for 3 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while Ragewing throws axes at 3 random enemy units. The axes drain their life force for 3,5 sec and deal pure damage equal to 25% of Ragewing's max health. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. When their life force is being drained, the units deal 30% less damage and take 50% more damage for 3,5 sec. Once in a while Ragewing flies into a bestial rage. It grows in size and all its stats are increased by 35% for 4 sec. Ragewing also launches a demonic orb at a random enemy unit every second for the duration. The orb bounces up to 3 times and deals pure damage equal to 10% of the target's max health on impact. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The orb also steals 35% of all stats from the target for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Ragewing also has a 45% chance to frighten the unit that has been hit by an orb for 2 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while Ragewing throws axes at 3 random enemy units. The axes drain their life force for 4 sec and deal pure damage equal to 30% of Ragewing's max health. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. When their life force is being drained, the units deal 35% less damage and take 60% more damage for 4 sec. Once in a while Ragewing flies into a bestial rage. It grows in size and all its stats are increased by 40% for 5 sec. Ragewing also launches a demonic orb at a random enemy unit every second for the duration. The orb bounces up to 3 times and deals pure damage equal to 15% of the target's max health on impact. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The orb also steals 40% of all stats from the target for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Ragewing also has a 45% chance to frighten the unit that has been hit by an orb for 2,5 sec. Once in a while Ragewing lets out a loud roar which stuns all enemy units for 3 sec and sunders their armor. When their armor is sundered, the units take pure damage equal to 30% of their max health, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 3 sec. These enemy units also take pure damage equal to 25% of their max health for 5 sec. When the stun ends, the targets' damage and attack speed are reduced by 35% for 3 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When the targets are hit by the axes, all enemy units in a small radius around the main targets take pure damage equal to 65% of damage taken by the initial targets.

description 4/6

When the targets are hit by the axes, all enemy units in a small radius around the main targets take pure damage equal to 65% of damage taken by the initial targets. Demonic orbs deal pure damage equal to 20% of Ragewing's max health for 3 sec.

description 6/6

When the targets are hit by the axes, all enemy units in a small radius around the main targets take pure damage equal to 65% of damage taken by the initial targets. Demonic orbs deal pure damage equal to 20% of Ragewing's max health for 3 sec. When Ragewing lets out a roar, it also removes 3 random shields or damage-reducing effects from all enemy units.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Ragewing recovers health equal to 40% of the damage dealt by the axes.

description 4/6

Ragewing recovers health equal to 40% of the damage dealt by the axes. When Ragewing flies into a bestial rage, it takes 35% less damage for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Ragewing recovers health equal to 40% of the damage dealt by the axes. When Ragewing flies into a bestial rage, it takes 35% less damage for 5 sec. When Ragewing lets out a roar, it also heals itself and all allied units for 25% of its max health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Enemy units hit by the axe have their physical and magic armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec.

description 4/6

Enemy units hit by the axe have their physical and magic armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec. When Ragewing flies into a bestial rage, 3 nearby allied units fly into a rage. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 20% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Enemy units hit by the axe have their physical and magic armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec. When Ragewing flies into a bestial rage, 3 nearby allied units fly into a rage. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 20% for 5 sec. If enemy units die within 3 sec of hearing Ragewing's roar, they can't be revived for 4 sec.

Materials

Horn of Fire
Protective Plate
